reviews.review_msg: calm luh teacher. loved her and she wazsgfy such a beauty skibidi to8

I had her as A grade 8 English teacher , she loved to pick sides and was an unfair and arbitrary marker. Loved to mock and from the recent comments I can tell she hasn't changed. BEWARE THAT JUST BY HAVING HER, YOUR AVERAGES WILL DROP !!!

She is more into her teaching  instead of helping the students. She is a hard marker.  She failed half of the class. She pretend she will help you but when you ask her, she will say she is too busy. She will always say "You will be fine"..watch out... it means you fail.....

This TA's marking makes no sense and is completely arbitrary. When you ask for help/advice she tells you not to worry about it, that you'll do fine. And then you get a bad mark out of the blue. Is extremely picky on insignificant, mundane stylistic details. Comments in general on essay are unclear and unhelpful.
Horrible teacher. Petty and small--her pedagogy is highly dubious.
No way, she is so nice. She may appear to be mean but you should overlook that and concentrate on her teaching. She is a great instructor.

The sound of her name literally makes me shudder. She expects graduate level writing for a 200 level course. Her comments on essays are mocking, cruel and generally uncalled for and don't bother asking her for help either. STAY AWAY!!!

I WISH I had read your comments before taking the course! i got a C on a paper! I've never had lower than a B+ except ONE time I got a B! I've taken up to 4th year courses in English, and in this second year course, she said my writing was not sophisticated enough!?!? That I have improper paragraph structure?!?! BAH! all of her comments were dumb

I absolutely hate this woman passionately! She is the most useless, mean, and generally tactless person I have ever met in my life.  She constantly seems annoyed, I have never seen her smile, and offers absolutely no constructive help.  She likes to spend her time, mocking you an asking "what is this or what were you thinking".
Stay away from this woman! Scary and dangerous
they should do something about this woman all the people I know who had her said she wasn't just a bad teacher she was inappropriate and very harsh

A disgrace to SFU in general, i find it hard to believe the school still employs her, she does not help students, does not explain her marking, does not express interest in the course, and marks as though this were not an undergrad course.  Basically, if you end up with her, you will get a bad mark,

Doesnt' want to teach / help. Makes it hard to get help. Union attitude. Will do as little as can get away with and nothing more. Doesn't make helpful comments on papers just negative criticism. Waste of money and insulting. Everyone I know taking this course thinks she is the worst they've had and thinks she's mean. Complains about her job also.

I agree with the other comment that Asia is mean spirited and unfair. She lacks tact and social grace--and from what I can understand, many of her students share this view. She rarely kept to her office hours and she constantly complained about how tough she has it.

TA for dist. ed. She's mean and insensitive. Not helpful and whines about her job. I have a GPA in the mid 3's been going to school for a while and just got my first mark lower than a B. What is worse is, I was told that I was lucky. If most of the class did bad it says something about the assmt. or course not the class. Avoid this woman if you can
